description: Custom Page or PCF control embedded inside Dynamics 365 / Power Apps
context: Runs inside D365 iframe — D365 provides the shell, nav, and header chrome

layout.note: Do not render your own top header — D365 already has one

tokens.theme_attribute: read from parent frame CSS vars if possible

table.style: match D365 grid — flat, no card borders

checklist: No top header or nav chrome (D365 provides it)
Colors use D365 Fluent token names where possible
No fixed/absolute positioned overlays that break in iframe
Xrm.WebApi used for Dataverse calls (not raw fetch)
Component height/padding matches D365 standard controls
Works at 100% zoom in 1024px wide iframe
